title: National Tech Fest 2026
subEvents:
Day 1: Hackathon & Competitive Programming
Day 2: Line Following Robot & Project Showcase
Day 3: Grand Finale & Prize Giving Ceremony
venue: UITS Permanent Campus Auditorium & Lab Rooms
details:
We are assembling a massive group to raid this year's National Tech Fest!

Whether you are competing in the hackathon, show-casing your projects, or just going as a visitor to cheer on and support our teams, join our squad so we can coordinate transportation, seats, and team support together.

Let's dominate the leaderboards and represent oU1TS with pride!

title: Intra-University Programming Contest
subEvents:
09:00 AM - 09:30 AM: Registration Verification
10:00 AM - 01:00 PM: Coding Contest (3 Hours)
01:30 PM - 02:00 PM: Editorial & Winner Announcement
details:
Ready to test your algorithms and speed? The Event Raiders are hosting a collaborative preparation and participation drive for the upcoming Intra-UITS programming contest.

We will have study groups, practice sessions beforehand, and will march into the labs together. Perfect for beginners and advanced problem solvers alike!

title: UI/UX & Web Development Boot Camp
subEvents:
Day 1: Modern Typography & CSS Layouts (Flex/Grid)
Day 2: Dynamic JS, APIs & SPA Architecture
Day 3: Design systems & Glassmorphism Aesthetics
Day 4: Showcase & Deployment on Netlify
venue: Seminar Library Room, UITS Permanent Campus
details:
A hands-on, intensive boot camp focused on building modern web applications.

We raided this boot camp in full force with 45+ members to learn the exact technologies used to build this website. A fantastic learning experience for everyone who wants to build awesome projects in the future.
